items.body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor` **Service directory:** `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/` **Triggered by:** commit b92bfc5e9 (PR #58439) by `@haiyuan-zhang` ## What Changed PR #58439 migrated the Azure Front Door management SDK from AutoRest/Swagger to TypeSpec (MPG — Management Plane Generator). This introduced a new `tsp-location.yaml` pointing to `specification/frontdoor/resource-manager/Microsoft.Network/FrontDoor`, regenerated all code under `src/Generated/`, and bumped the package to `1.5.0-beta.1`. The key resource types now include `FrontDoorResource`, `FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource`, `FrontDoorRulesEngineResource`, `FrontDoorNetworkExperimentProfileResource`, `FrontendEndpointResource`, and `FrontDoorExperimentResource`. ## Gaps Found - **No inline code examples in README** — the `## Examples` section only links to a generic samples page; there are no snippet placeholders and no `tests/Samples/` directory with `#region Snippet:` tagged methods - **"Key concepts" section is empty/generic** — it links to the SDK introduction page but does not describe the FrontDoor-specific resource types and their relationships (FrontDoor → FrontendEndpoints, RulesEngines; WAF Policies; Network Experiment Profiles and Experiments) - **CHANGELOG 1.5.0-beta.1 is empty** — the MPG migration is a meaningful change (TypeSpec-based regeneration, new API shape) and should be documented under `### Other Changes` or `### Features Added` - **No `tests/Samples/` directory** — there are auto-generated samples under `tests/Generated/Samples/` but no hand-authored sample files with snippet markers usable by `Update-Snippets.ps1`
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files #### 1a. Update `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/README.md` Edit the file. Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section and update `## Examples` as shown below. **Replace** the existing `## Key concepts` block: ```markdown ## Key concepts Key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here]((azure.github.io/redacted) ``` **With:** ```markdown ## Key concepts `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor` provides resource management support for Microsoft Azure Front Door services. The main resource types are: | Resource class | Description | |---|---| | `FrontDoorResource` | Represents a Front Door load-balancer/CDN instance with routing rules, backend pools, and frontend endpoints | | `FrontendEndpointResource` | A frontend hostname (CNAME) attached to a Front Door | | `FrontDoorRulesEngineResource` | A rules-engine configuration that allows advanced request-routing conditions on a Front Door | | `FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource` | A WAF policy that can be linked to a Front Door frontend endpoint | | `FrontDoorNetworkExperimentProfileResource` | A Network Experiment profile used to measure latency between clients and Azure endpoints | | `FrontDoorExperimentResource` | An individual experiment inside a Network Experiment profile | All resource instances are obtained through an `ArmClient`: ```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_GetArmClient ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); ``` ``` **Replace** the existing `## Examples` block: ```markdown ## Examples Code samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations - [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted) ``` **With:** ```markdown ## Examples ### Create or update a Front Door ```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_CreateOrUpdate ``` ### Get a WAF Policy ```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_GetWafPolicy ``` ### List all Front Doors in a subscription ```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_ListAll ``` ``` #### 1b. Update `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/CHANGELOG.md` Edit the file. Fill in the empty `1.5.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section: **Replace:** ```markdown ## 1.5.0-beta.1 (Unreleased) ### Features Added ### Breaking Changes ### Bugs Fixed ### Other Changes ``` **With:** ```markdown ## 1.5.0-beta.1 (Unreleased) ### Other Changes - Migrated SDK code generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec (Management Plane Generator). The public API surface is unchanged; internal serialization and client pipeline infrastructure now use the TypeSpec-based generator. ``` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets Create a new file at `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/tests/Samples/Sample1_FrontDoor.cs` with the following content: ```csharp // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved. // Licensed under the MIT License. using System; using System.Threading.Tasks; using Azure.Core; using Azure.Identity; using Azure.ResourceManager; using Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor; using Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor.Models; using Azure.ResourceManager.Resources; using NUnit.Framework; namespace Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor.Tests.Samples { public class Sample1_FrontDoor { [Test] [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")] public async Task GetArmClient() { #region Snippet:FrontDoor_GetArmClient ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); #endregion } [Test] [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")] public async Task CreateOrUpdate() { #region Snippet:FrontDoor_CreateOrUpdate ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); string subscriptionId = ""; string resourceGroupName = ""; string frontDoorName = ""; ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}")) .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName); FrontDoorCollection frontDoors = resourceGroup.GetFrontDoors(); FrontDoorData data = new FrontDoorData(new AzureLocation("global")) { FriendlyName = frontDoorName, }; ArmOperation lro = await frontDoors.CreateOrUpdateAsync( WaitUntil.Completed, frontDoorName, data); FrontDoorResource frontDoor = lro.Value; Console.WriteLine($"Created Front Door: {frontDoor.Data.Name}"); #endregion } [Test] [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")] public async Task GetWafPolicy() { #region Snippet:FrontDoor_GetWafPolicy ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); string subscriptionId = ""; string resourceGroupName = ""; string policyName = ""; ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}")) .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName); FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource policy = await resourceGroup .GetFrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies() .GetAsync(policyName); Console.WriteLine($"WAF Policy mode: {policy.Data.PolicySettings?.Mode}"); #endregion } [Test] [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")] public async Task ListAll() { #region Snippet:FrontDoor_ListAll ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); string subscriptionId = ""; SubscriptionResource subscription = await client .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}")) .GetAsync(); await foreach (FrontDoorResource frontDoor in subscription.GetFrontDoorsAsync()) { Console.WriteLine(frontDoor.Data.Name); } #endregion } } } ``` ### Step 3: Verify README structure The README currently has all required sections. The following sections need content improvements: | Section | Status | Action | |---|---|---| | Getting started – Install | ✅ Present | No change | | Getting started – Prerequisites | ✅ Present | No change | | Getting started – Authenticate | ✅ Present | No change | | Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic only | Add FrontDoor-specific resource table (see Step 1) | | Examples | ⚠️ No code | Add snippet placeholders (see Step 1) | | Troubleshooting | ✅ Present | No change | | Next steps | ✅ Present | No change | | Contributing | ✅ Present | No change | Reference: `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order from the repository root: 1. `dotnet build sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 frontdoor` — injects the `#region Snippet:` code blocks into the README placeholders; verify with `git diff sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/README.md` 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 frontdoor` — regenerates public API listing files (only needed if any public types were added or changed) 5. `dotnet format sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/`
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
items.title: [FrontDoor] Docs: Add key concepts, inline code examples, and update CHANGELOG for MPG migration
